summary: Iteration 4 testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - Reservations page with French UI and filters, MiniCalendar component with French locale, 3 payment options (Card, TWINT, Cash). Backend overdue cron job is running (confirmed in logs).

minor.issue: Some status badges show raw value 'pending_cash' instead of French label. Should be consistent with other French labels.

issues: Status badge 'pending_cash' shown as-is instead of French translation. Other statuses use French labels (Confirmée, En attente, etc.)

action_items: Consider translating 'pending_cash' status to French in reservations.tsx (e.g., 'Espèces en attente')
critical_code_review_comments: reservations.tsx line 29-31: statusLabels map doesn't include 'pending_cash' key for French translation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features verified: 1) Overdue cron job running (log shows 'Overdue cron job started'), 2) POST /api/admin/check-overdue endpoint works, 3) Reservations page shows French UI with 'Mes Locations' header, filter chips, French status badges, CHF prices, and 'Annuler la réservation' cancel button, 4) Booking page uses refactored MiniCalendar component with French locale, 5) Three payment options available (Card, TWINT, Cash). Minor issue: 'pending_cash' status badge not translated to French.

overdue_cron_job.details: Cron job started - confirmed in backend logs 'Overdue cron job started (checks every hour)'

reservations_page_french_ui.details: 'Mes Locations' header, French filter chips (Toutes, En attente, Confirmées, En cours, Terminées), French date labels (Début, Fin), CHF prices

reservations_cancel_button_french.details: 'Annuler la réservation' text displayed for cancelable reservations

reservations_status_badges_french.details: Most badges show French (Confirmée, En attente, etc). Note: 'pending_cash' shows raw value

minicalendar_component.details: Calendar opens as modal popup with French month names (Février, etc), French weekday headers (Lu, Ma, Me, Je, Ve, Sa, Di)

payment_options_three.details: Three options: Carte bancaire (Visa, Mastercard), TWINT (Paiement mobile suisse), Espèces (Payer lors de la prise)

payment_button_text_changes.details: Button changes to 'Réserver (Espèces)' when cash selected, 'Payer par Carte' for card
